description_long: This SUV features a bold and unconventional design, painted primarily in deep purple with striking gold flame-like accents along the sides and rear. The vehicle is equipped with rugged off-road elements, including a reinforced front bumper, roof rack, and side steps, suggesting it is built for both urban and adventurous environments. The windows are tinted, and the interior appears to have standard seating for passengers. The wheels are robust, with a utilitarian design, and a spare tire is mounted on the rear. Decorative elements, such as the gold flames and custom bodywork, give the SUV a unique, almost fantastical appearance. The overall build is boxy and sturdy, with visible doors and functional components like mirrors and lights.
description: A purple SUV with gold flame accents, rugged off-road features, and a custom, eye-catching design. It has a boxy build, reinforced bumpers, and a roof rack.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the gold flame accents, reinforced front bumper, and detailed side bodywork.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the aggressive front grille, headlight details, and the continuation of the gold flame motif.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the spare tire, rear door, and the full extent of the gold flame design along the side.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the back of the SUV, the roof rack, and the gold accents wrapping around the rear.
attribute_wheel_design: black steel wheels with simple, solid centers and no visible spokes
